scenarios.input: Approve revision 1 after revision 2 was saved.
Edit a safe draft to include protected-class steering.
scenarios.expected: Artifact becomes blocked and approval is impossible.

scenarios.input: Scout returns a value without a source.
scenarios.expected: Reducer rejects the card and records the gap.

scenarios.input: Scout output cites a source outside its allowlist.

scenarios.expected: Budget-exceeded result and graceful partial summary.

scenarios.input: Approve the same artifact revision twice.
Run a contact loop for a lead with no contact channel.
scenarios.expected: Inspectable skipped-condition run and no fabricated contact.

scenarios.input: Send another agent id in a request.
scenarios.expected: Server ignores client tenant identity and uses the session.

scenarios.input: Two grounded sources conflict on a decision-critical claim.
scenarios.expected: One deeper scout maximum, then one human question.

scenarios.input: Retrieved memory conflicts with newer grounded evidence.
scenarios.expected: Current cited evidence wins and conflict stays inspectable.
